cmd:
until [ -x /var/lib/easyenclave/bin/dd-podman ]; do sleep 2; done
exec /var/lib/easyenclave/bin/dd-podman run --rm --name ollama --network=host --device=/dev/nvidia0 --device=/dev/nvidiactl --device=/dev/nvidia-uvm -v /var/lib/easyenclave/ollama:/root/.ollama -e OLLAMA_HOST=127.0.0.1:11434 docker.io/ollama/ollama:latest serve
